items.question: What is Network?
items.answer: Network is the Wink connectivity layer for making selected hotel supply available to approved partner demand routes.

items.question: Who uses Network?
items.answer: Hotels use Network to control participation, while Partners use the approved routes to discover and promote eligible hotel supply.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Hotels can request a demo, and partners can review the partner path before joining. The default partner commission is 10% on confirmed bookings, with 6-month attribution per click.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
